name: Fine Sinter Co., Ltd.
summary: Fine Sinter Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile parts, railroad vehicle parts, and hydraulic equipment worldwide. Its automotive parts include engines, shock absorbers, transmission and parts, steering parts, body parts, and brakes. The company also offers pantograph contact strips and brake linings for railroad vehicles; industrial machinery, such as industrial machinery parts, business machines/home electric appliances, and sintered vents; and hydraulic units comprising hydraulic equipment and hydraulic packages. Fine Sinter Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Kasugai, Japan.
